limitations: AI investment is entirely a minority equity stake in an unnamed external healthcare AI company, not internal AI infrastructure or capex; score reflects disclosed financial commitment rather than operational build-out
The healthcare generative AI company is never named, and no details of its products or UHS's use of its technology are disclosed; concreteness is limited to investment relationship only

Risk section excerpts label is 'risk_factors' but the AI risk content appears in the cybersecurity section (item_1b); the named AI risk is specific to threat-actor use of AI, not to UHS's own AI adoption risks
No quantified multi-year AI investment program disclosed; the $115M figure reflects cumulative fair value of the equity stake, not a forward capex commitment
